title: Her Legs.
content:
Fain would I kiss my Julia's dainty leg,
    Which is as white and hairless as an egg.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Her Legs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
